result.stdout:
Description:
  blazorfmt - A Prettier-like formatter for Blazor components

Usage:
  blazorfmt [<files>...] [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:
  <files>  Files to format (shorthand for 'format' command) []

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information


Commands:
  format <files>  Format Blazor/Razor files []
  init            Initialize a new configuration file

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

commands.payload:
Description:
  blazorfmt - A Prettier-like formatter for Blazor components

Usage:
  blazorfmt [<files>...] [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:
  <files>  Files to format (shorthand for 'format' command) []

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information


Commands:
  format <files>  Format Blazor/Razor files []
  init            Initialize a new configuration file

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Format Blazor/Razor files

Usage:
  blazorfmt [<files>...] format [<files>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <files>  Files to format (shorthand for 'format' command) []
  <files>  Blazor/Razor files to format []

Options:
  -w, --write                                              Write formatted output back to files
  -c, --check                                              Check if files are formatted (exit with error if not)
  --config <config>                                        Path to configuration file
  --indent-size <indent-size>                              Number of spaces for indentation
  --use-tabs                                               Use tabs instead of spaces
  --attribute-break-threshold <attribute-break-threshold>  Number of attributes before breaking to multiple lines
  --content-break-threshold <content-break-threshold>      Number of attributes before breaking content to new line
  --break-content-with-many-attributes                     Break content to new line when element has many attributes
  -?, -h, --help                                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  blazorfmt [<files>...] format [<files>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <files>  Files to format (shorthand for 'format' command) []
  <files>  Blazor/Razor files to format []

Options:
  -w, --write                                              Write formatted output back to files
  -c, --check                                              Check if files are formatted (exit with error if not)
  --config <config>                                        Path to configuration file
  --indent-size <indent-size>                              Number of spaces for indentation
  --use-tabs                                               Use tabs instead of spaces
  --attribute-break-threshold <attribute-break-threshold>  Number of attributes before breaking to multiple lines
  --content-break-threshold <content-break-threshold>      Number of attributes before breaking content to new line
  --break-content-with-many-attributes                     Break content to new line when element has many attributes
  -?, -h, --help                                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize a new configuration file

Usage:
  blazorfmt [<files>...] init [options]

Arguments:
  <files>  Files to format (shorthand for 'format' command) []

Options:
  -f, --force     Overwrite existing configuration file
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Options:
  -f, --force     Overwrite existing configuration file
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
